name: expand-the-timeline-agent-s-20260404-0454
idea:
Expand the timeline agent's create_task tool to support all generation paths available in the app. Currently the agent only supports 5 task types (text-to-image, image-to-video, style-transfer, subject-transfer, scene-transfer) but the app has 15+.

The agent's task creation lives in:
- reigh-app/supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tools/create-task.ts (task type routing)
- reigh-app/supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tools/generation.ts (param building, calls /functions/v1/create-task)
- reigh-app/supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tool-schemas.ts (tool definitions exposed to the LLM)
- reigh-app/supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/prompts.ts (system prompt describing capabilities)

The create-task edge function already has resolvers for all task types — we just need the agent to know about them and build correct params.

Generation paths to add (with correct model routing as used in-app):

1. **z-image text-to-image** (family: image_generation, model_name: 'z-image' → task_type: z_image_turbo)
   - Currently agent defaults to wan_2_2_t2i. Should be able to choose z-image for faster/different style.

2. **z-image image-to-image** (family: z_image_turbo_i2i → task_type: z_image_turbo_i2i)
   - Transform an existing image with a prompt + strength param. Needs image_url from selected clip.
   - Resolver: reigh-app/supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/zImageTurboI2I.ts

3. **qwen image editing / magic edit** (family: magic_edit → task_type: qwen_image_edit)
   - Edit an image with a prompt (no mask). Uses qwen-edit model.
   - Resolver: reigh-app/supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/magicEdit.ts

4. **masked edit / inpainting** (family: masked_edit → task_type: image_inpaint)
   - Edit specific region of image. Needs mask_url — may not be practical from agent without mask.
   - Resolver: reigh-app/supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/maskedEdit.ts
   - Could skip this one since agent can't draw masks.

5. **image upscale** (family: image_upscale → task_type: image-upscale)
   - Upscale an image. Needs image_url from selected clip.
   - Resolver: reigh-app/supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/imageUpscale.ts

6. **video enhance** (family: video_enhance → task_type: video_enhance)
   - Interpolation + upscaling for video clips. Needs video_url.
   - Resolver: reigh-app/supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/videoEnhance.ts

7. **character animate** (family: character_animate → task_type: animate_character)
   - Animate a character image with a motion video reference.
   - Resolver: reigh-app/supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/characterAnimate.ts

8. **LTX vs Wan travel orchestrator distinction**
   - Frontend supports model_ids: 'wan-2.2', 'ltx-2.3', 'ltx-2.3-fast'
   - Agent should be able to specify which model for image-to-video
   - Check reigh-app/src/tools/travel-between-images/modelCapabilities.ts

9. **Model selection for text-to-image**
   - Agent should be able to choose between: wan (default), z-image (fast), qwen-image (style-capable)
   - Currently hardcoded in generation.ts

Key constraints:
- Don't change the create-task edge function or resolvers — they're already correct
- Only change the agent-side code: create-task.ts, generation.ts, tool-schemas.ts, prompts.ts
- The LLM tool schema needs clear descriptions of each generation type so the model can route correctly
- Follow existing patterns in generation.ts for building request bodies
- Test with the harness after changes

Key files to read:
- Agent task creation: supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tools/create-task.ts, generation.ts
- Agent tool schema: supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tool-schemas.ts
- Agent system prompt: supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/prompts.ts
- All resolvers: supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/*.ts (to understand expected params)
- Frontend model selection: src/tools/travel-between-images/modelCapabilities.ts
